---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the pain point or use case.

**Proposed solution**
How should it work?

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you thought about.

**Which part of the system does this touch?**
- [ ] Ingestion (new source types)
- [ ] MCP tools (new tools or improvements)
- [ ] Search/retrieval (ranking, semantic search)
- [ ] Classification/synthesis pipeline
- [ ] Web dashboard
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Integration (new AI platforms)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

**Would you like to implement this?**
PRs welcome. Read EXTENDING.md and llms.txt first -- or tell your AI agent to.
